title: Tragacantha luxurians
intro:

Tragacanth, also known as Tragacantha luxurians, is a plant that produces a thick, sticky sap, which is used to produce a type of gum or adhesive. The health benefits of Tragacanth include its ability to soothe digestive issues, act as a natural laxative, and help to lower cholesterol levels. The bioactive constituents of Tragacanth include tragacanthin, a type of polysaccharide, as well as other mucilages and flavonoids. The most common herbal preparations made with Tragacanth include powdered gum, liquid extracts, and capsules, which are often used to treat digestive issues and skin irritations.
uses: Tragacantha luxurians, also known as the giant knapweed, is a plant with various traditional medicinal uses. It has been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions.
